workflow.name: Firebird HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate Firebird HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare Firebird inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/firebird-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[firebird]
10.31.117.11 role=firebird name=firebird-01
10.31.117.12 role=firebird name=firebird-02
10.31.117.13 role=firebird name=firebird-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install Firebird container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/firebird-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: firebird
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/firebird-inventory.ini /tmp/firebird-runtime.yml

data.label: Render Firebird cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/firebird-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: firebird
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/firebird
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/firebird/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            firebird:
              image: firebirdsql/firebird:5.0
              container_name: octastack-firebird
              restart: unless-stopped
              environment:
                FIREBIRD_ROOT_PASSWORD: "change-me"
              ports:
                - "3050:3050"
              volumes:
                - data:/firebird/data
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy Firebird cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/firebird-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/firebird/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/firebird/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/firebird/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/firebird-inventory.ini /tmp/firebird-deploy.yml

data.label: Document Firebird topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/firebird-topology.md <<'EOF'
# Firebird HA topology

Members:
- firebird-01: 10.31.117.11 (firebird)
- firebird-02: 10.31.117.12 (firebird)
- firebird-03: 10.31.117.13 (firebird)

This example deploys one Firebird container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/firebird-topology.md

data.label: Validate Firebird cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/firebird-inventory.ini firebird -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'
